prompt:
You are authoring the per-slice post-deploy verification plan for the following Stripe webhook handler slice. Produce: (1) per-AC signal mapping table; (2) log queries with EXACT structured fields (service, route, status, deploy_sha, time window); (3) dashboard panel URLs with time ranges bounded by the deploy window; (4) smoke-test walkthrough with EXACT inputs (curl command with signed payload OR test fixture name + exact assertion); (5) negative check; (6) rollback trigger checklist. Vagueness is forbidden -- not 'monitor the dashboard for errors' but a panel URL with the time range and scoped tags; not 'check Sentry' but a Sentry filter query string.

Slice file (SLICES/22_stripe_webhook_idempotency.md):

```markdown
# Slice 22: Stripe webhook idempotency

Deploy: production, sha=`9f8e7d6`, ts=2026-06-05T14:30:00Z
Feature flag: none

## Acceptance criteria
- AC-1: `POST /api/v1/webhooks/stripe` returns 200 on first receipt of a `customer.subscription.created` event.
- AC-2: A duplicate of the same event (same `event.id`) returns 200 but does NOT re-execute side effects (no new subscription row, no duplicate billing email).
- AC-3: Webhook signature verification rejects unsigned requests with 400 (security regression check).
```

Observability stack: Datadog Logs `https://app.datadoghq.com/logs`, Datadog APM `https://app.datadoghq.com/apm/services/webhook-api`, Sentry `https://sentry.io/fhorja`, Postgres `db.fhorja.supabase.co`, feature-flag system: NONE.

Named on-call human: `@bruno`.

Deploy window: 2026-06-05T14:30:00Z -> 2026-06-05T15:30:00Z (1h smoke window).
expected_output: Every signal is query-shaped: log queries include service:webhook-api OR equivalent + status:... + deploy_sha:9f8e7d6 + time-window bounded by the 14:30-15:30 deploy window. Dashboard URLs include the panel ID + the time range as URL params or explicit notes. Smoke-test for AC-2 includes the EXACT curl command (or equivalent test fixture name) with a signed payload, AND the exact assertion (no new row in subscriptions; no new email_send event). AC-3 smoke is an unsigned curl returning 400. Negative check: log query for the pre-slice non-idempotent code path showing zero hits, OR a dashboard panel showing duplicate-event signal at zero. Rollback: `@bruno` + exact command (e.g. `vercel rollback <deploy-id>` or `git revert 9f8e7d6 && vercel --prod`). Baseline failure mode: 'check Datadog and Sentry' / 'smoke the webhook' without exact filters, panel IDs, or curl commands -- which is generic ops advice, not a slice-specific runbook.
